Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru is eagerly watching[n]all the people pass by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Oooh! Is that you there, Koromaru?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Do you remember me? I used to play shogi with the priest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Whew, I'm sorry, but do you mind if I rest here for a bit?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Much obliged. Sorry to bother you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Whew... The years are catching up to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}In that case, I have to give you my thanks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}So thank you. For taking Koromaru in as your family.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}A lot's been going on ever since the priest's accident.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}To tell you the truth, someone else was willing to take Koromaru in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_015_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But he was always at the shrine.

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}A sweet and pleasant young lady. Koromaru took quite a shine to her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Only... Well, he'd keep coming back to the shrine gate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}We eventually realized that Koromaru kept going back to the shrine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I'm not sure what it was, but it seemed like he had some unfinished business.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}And after that, no one else was able to take him in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}If he's here now, I take it he achieved his goal, then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I can't say I really understand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}But if you do, then Koromaru must be happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I see. You did well, didn't you, boy?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}To be honest, I don't really understand any of this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}But if you do, then Koromaru must be happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I believe that Koromaru's bright enough to choose where he wants to be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}And that means it must be his choice to be here with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Be good to each other, will you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}All right, I've rested plenty. I'll get out of your hair before it gets too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Poor old man... He's hurting his[n]back from carrying too much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}I'm sorry to be such a bother. Yes, would you mind taking half of what I'm carrying?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Oh, that's very sweet of you. I'd like that very much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I walked with[n]the old man back to his place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Hehe, you're in a good mood, Koro-chan. Did you go for a walk?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}I believe Koromaru-san wants to thank you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think Koromaru appreciates me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has increased[n]after helping people with Koromaru.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Should we head in? It's almost Koro-chan's dinner time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}I'll be preparing your dinner today, Koromaru-san. I hope you look forward to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We headed in the dorm after[n]Koromaru calmed down a bit.[n]{f 1 1}
